sections.paragraph:
verb צויד

be equipped, supplied with, furnished with

verb לציד (>>לצייד)

to equip, supply with, furnish with

verb להצטיד (>>להצטייד)

to equip oneself

masculine noun צד

side, expoasl, exposure, phase; aspect, facet

side, expoasl, exposure, phase; aspect, facet

hunt, hunting, chase, shooting, killing, quarry, kill; game; provisions
